text.title: Fixed Vs Hourly Decision Framework Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to produce a decision record.

step.name: gather-scope
step.input: Client brief + prior project notes + own portfolio
step.action: Compile scope summary; note client maturity signals (past projects, change-order discipline); note your domain familiarity.

step.name: score-signals
step.action: Score each of 4 signals on low/medium/high. Missing data defaults to low.

step.name: pick-shape
step.action: Walk the tree to pick fixed / hourly / hybrid. Note rejected options.

step.name: record-decision
step.action: Fill decision record: kill_criteria per option, reversal_trigger, decider, decided_at, reassessment date (decided_at + 25% of engagement length).
step.decision-gate: If reversal_trigger missing, do not finalize.

step.name: reassess-at-25pct
step.action: At 25% elapsed, re-score signals. If any band flipped, file delta record + consider reshape.
